zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor於1158年5月22日出生在英國賀福爾維格莫 卡素時，他的父親Hugh de Mortimer41歲，母親Maud de Meschines32歲。他和Isabella de Ferrers至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1214年6月24日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor于1158年5月22日出生在英国賀福爾維格莫 卡素时，他的父亲Hugh de Mortimer41岁，母亲Maud de Meschines32岁。他和Isabella de Ferrers至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1214年6月24日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾維格莫。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor was born on 22 May 1158, in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England, his father, Hugh de Mortimer, was 41 and his mother, Maud de Meschines, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Isabella de Ferrers. He died on 24 June 1214, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor est né le 22 mai 1158, à Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Mortimer, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Maud de Meschines, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Isabella de Ferrers. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1214, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor am 22. Mai 1158 in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Mortimer 41 und seine Mutter Maud de Meschines 32. Er hatte mit Isabella de Ferrers mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Juni 1214 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor è nato il il 22 maggio 1158 nel Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Mortimer, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Meschines, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Isabella de Ferrers. Morì il 24 giugno 1214, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmorが1158年5月22日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモー カストルで生まれた時，父Hugh de Mortimerは41歳，母Maud de Meschinesは32歳であった。彼はIsabella de Ferrersとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1214年6月24日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor(이)가 1158년 5월 22일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Mortimer(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Meschines(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Isabella de Ferrers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 6월 24일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어에 묻혔다.

pt.22 May 1158–24 June 1214: 22 de maio de 1158–24 de junho de 1214
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor nasceu em 22 de maio de 1158, em Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Mortimer, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Meschines, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Isabella de Ferrers. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1214, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor родился 22 мая 1158 г. в местности вигмор кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Mortimer было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de Meschines, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Isabella de Ferrers. Он умер 24 июня 1214 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.22 May 1158–24 June 1214: 22 de mayo de 1158–24 de junio de 1214
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor nació el 22 de mayo de 1158, en Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Mortimer, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Maud de Meschines, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Isabella de Ferrers. Murió el 24 de junio de 1214, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
